message:
test(perf): add unit tests for PERF-2 conversation prefix cache

Cover the prefix cache lifecycle in MessageRenderCache with 6 tests:
- prefix_initially_invalid: fresh cache reports no valid prefix
- prefix_valid_after_set: set/get round-trip works correctly
- prefix_invalid_after_message_count_change: adding a message stales it
- prefix_invalid_after_invalidate_all: theme/resize/toggle stales it
- prefix_cleared_on_clear: conversation reset empties the prefix
- prefix_revalidates_after_rebuild: stale prefix can be rebuilt

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
